verses.text: Tua ciangin Efraim mite in Gideon kiangah, “Midian-te a do dingin na kuancil lai-in kote nong saploh, kote hong bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in nakpi takin amah mawhsak uh hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh teh dingin kote bang hi lel ka hi uh hiam? No Efraim minamte' sep a themno khat pen ko minam bup khempeuhte' sep sangin thupizaw hilo ahi hiam

Pasian in note' khutsungah Midian uliante Oreb leh Zeeb hong piazo hi. Note tawh teh dingin kote in bang hihzo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah hih bangin kam a pau ciangin ama tunga amau' hehna a bei hi.
Tua ciangin Gideon leh amah tawh a om mi za thumte, Jordan tungin galkah uh a, a gimpi mahin amaute delh lai uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sukkoth mite kiangah, “Kong thum hi, kei hong zuite tungah anlum pawlkhat pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute gim uh a, Midian kumpi Zebah leh Zalmunna a delh ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Sukkoth uliante in, “Na galkapte tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah leh Zalmunna na khutsungah omkhin ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Gideon in, “Tua ahih leh pha hi. Topa in Zebah leh Zalmunna ka khutsungah hong piak khit ciangin gamlak lingte leh lingkungte tawh na sa uh ka kuikek ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua lai panin Penuel-ah paito a, amaute tungah zong tua mah bangin a gen hi. Penuel mite in Sukkoth mite' dawn' mah bangin amah na dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in Penuel mite kiangah, “Lungnuamin kong paikik ciangin hih tausang ka supai ding hi,” a ci hi

Tu-in Zebah leh Zalmunna-te, Nisuahna lam mi galkap khempeuh sung pan a omlaiteng, mihing tul sawm leh tul nga bang bek a pha lai a galkapte uh tawh Karkor-ah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau a tawi mi tul za leh tul sawmnih si khin hi
Tua ciangin Nobah leh Jogbehah nisuahna lam mihonte' tot lampi zui-in Gideon paito-in a galte va bingphawn' hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a galte uh galvil omlo hi
Tua ciangin Zebah leh Zalmunna tai uh hi. Amah in amaute delhin Midian kumpi nihte Zebah leh Zalmunna manin amau' galkap khempeuh kithehthang sak hi
Tua ciangin Joash' tapa Gideon a galsimna panin Heres kahtohna lam tawnin ciahkik hi
Amah in Sukkoth mi tangval khat manin thu dong hi. Tuapa in ama-a' dingin uliante leh upate mihing sawmsagih leh sagih a min gelhsak hi

Tua ciangin Sukkoth mite kiangah amah tungin, “Kei tungah hong kisialin, ‘A gim na mite tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah leh Zalmunna na khutsungah omkhin ahi hiam?’ na cih uh Zebah leh Zalmunna en un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in a khuapi upate sam a, gamlak lingte leh lingkungte zong la-in, tuate tawh Sukkoth mite a thuhilh hi
Tua ciangin amah in Penuel tausang supai-in tua khua mite a that hi
Tua ciangin amah in Zebah leh Zalmunna kiangah, “Tabor-ah na thah uh mite koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amaute, nangmah bang uh hi; amaute in kumpipa' tapate suun uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute, ka sanggam, ka laigui zoppihte ahi uh hi. Topa a nuntak mah bangin, amaute suaktasak hi le-uhcin note kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in a ta upa pen Jether kiangah, “Ding in, amaute that in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tangvalpa in a namsau dok ngamlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah tangval lai ahih manin a lungsim hang nailo hi

Tua ciangin Zebah leh Zalmunna in, “Nangmahmah ding in la, kote hong hih in; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nasep a sem dingin pasal mah kisam hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Gideon dingin Zebah leh Zalmunna that a, amau' kalaohte' ngawng-a a om khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate a la hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Gideon' Sep Dangte leh A Sihna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gideon kiangah, “Nang leh na tapa leh na tupa dong in zong kote hong uk un; bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-te' khutsung panin kote nong honkhia hi,” a ci uh hi
Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note kong uk kei ding a, ka tapa in zong note hong uklo ding hi. Topa in note hong uk ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note tung panin kong ngetnop khat om hi. Note in van kinusia na top uh lak panin bilbahte hong pia un,” a ci hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Ishmael mite ahih manin kham bilbah nei uh hi
Amaute in dawngin, “Lungkim takin kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in puan phah uh a, mi khempeuh in van kinusia a top uh lak panin bilbahte tua puan tungah a lawn uh hi

Ama nget kham bilbahte a gihna pen kham shekel tul khat leh za sagih ahi hi. Midian kumpite in a zat khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate, khainiangte, puan dupsante, leh a kalaohte uh ngawng kimkotah a om ngawng-awhte a kisimlo ahi hi
Tua ciangin Gideon in tuate mi limin bawlin ama khuapi Ofrah khua-ah a koih hi. Israel-te khempeuh in tua lai munah tua milim bia uh a, Gideon leh a innkuanpihte-a' dingin thangzak khat a suak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite' mai-ah Midian-te guallel uh a, amaute kihisak zo nawnlo uh hi. Gideon' hun sungin tua gam in kum sawmli sung lungnopna a nei hi
Joash' tapa Gideon pai-in ama aituam inn-ah a teng hi
Tu-in Gideon in tapa sawmsagih, ama-a' mahmah nei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zi tampi nei hi
Shekhem-ah a om a zineu in zong tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Abimelek a phuak hi
Tua ciangin Joash' tapa Gideon teeksih a, Abiezer mite' neihsa Ofrah khua-a om a pa Joash' hanah kivui hi
Gideon a sih khit phetin Israel mite kihei kikin Baal-te bia uh a, a pasian dingun Baalberith a bawl uh hi
Israel mite in, mun khempeuh panin amau' galte' khutsung pan a honkhia Topa a Pasian uh phawklo uh hi
Jerubbaal (Gideon a cihna) in Israel-te tungah a bawl thuhoihte khempeuh hangin amaute in Jerubbaal innkuante tungah lungdamna bangmah laklo uh hi.
